metadata.title: Canada Methane Emitters — ECCC GHGRP
metadata.source: Environment and Climate Change Canada — Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program
metadata.description: Facility-level methane (CH4) emissions for all Canadian facilities reporting ≥10kt CO2e/year. Includes coordinates, company, source type, and annual CH4 in tonnes.
metadata.notes: Primary data from ECCC GHGRP (2596 facilities). Supplemented with 14 curated sites from research for provinces/regions underrepresented in GHGRP.
